summary: Role-by-Role UAT Complete. Tested 5 roles: RM, Venue Specialist, Venue Manager, VAM/Team Lead, Admin. All roles passed login, dashboard redirect, navigation, page access, and access control tests. 100% pass rate on all tested roles.

P2_polish.issue: venue_manager role missing sidebar navigation config in DashboardLayout.js
P2_polish.details: DashboardLayout.js switch statement doesn't have a case for 'venue_manager' role, so it falls to default which only shows 'Home'. Should add sidebar items for Approval Queue, Publish Queue, Onboarding Monitor.

P2_polish.issue: data_team role missing sidebar navigation config in DashboardLayout.js
P2_polish.details: DashboardLayout.js switch statement doesn't have a case for 'data_team' role, so it falls to default which only shows 'Home'. Should add sidebar items for Refinement Queue.

Two P2 polish issues found: venue_manager and data_team roles missing sidebar navigation config in DashboardLayout.js. Finance and Data Team roles could not be tested due to missing credentials.
